title: Executive Order 5490—Power-Site Restoration No. 453
text:
Montana
So much of the orders of November 3, 1909, creating Temporary Power-Site Withdrawal No. 47, and July 2, 1910, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 47, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
MONTANA MERIDIAN
T. 13 S., R. 3 W., sec. 27, SE. ¼ SW. ¼, S. ½ SE. ¼;
sec. 33, S. ½ SW. ¼, NE. ¼ SE. ¼, S. ½ SE. ¼;
sec. 34, N. ½ N. ½.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
November 15, 1930.
